declared_plan_copy.task_source_hash_basis: utf-8 inline task_statement body at materialization time
declared_plan_copy.task_statement:
ADVERSARIAL REVIEW (read-only) of the UNCOMMITTED working-tree diff vs HEAD (git diff): the lane tool-policy three-tier repair. It claims: (1) a closed tier decision write/read/none with ambiguity failing closed to none; (2) write tier behavior unchanged; (3) read tier for reviewer-readonly / leader-coordination / no-write lead steps renders READ-ONLY inspection rules (files, search, diff, checker run) with NO edit/write/git permissions; (4) gemini stays none (documented); (5) QA/review/design brick contracts now REQUIRE repository-artifact references in returned evidence, and packet-only returns become missing required facts at comparison.
ATTACK: (a) any path where the read tier leaks edit/write/git permission wording or capability — this is the catastrophic mode, hunt it hardest (mutate conditions mentally across all 8 agent objects x write/no-write steps); (b) the tier admission set — can an unknown/ambiguous policy reach read instead of none; (c) grounding side effects — does any legitimate lane/step (closure, coo review, parked chat-session work) now fail comparison unfairly; (d) regressions to the chat-session park seam or effective-write validation; (e) checker pins — would each FIRE mutation actually fire RED. Read the actual diff and cite file:line for every finding. Verdict line first: HOLDS or BROKEN, then findings with concrete repro. Honest uncertainty beats invented findings.

plan_hash_basis: canonical sorted-key JSON of the pure declared-building-plan copy (runtime walker state excluded)
